axenic_LD.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD (mixed, periodicity)
axenic_LD.functional_description: This cluster includes 68 genes showing 24-h periodicity only in axenic L:D conditions. Not discussed in paper specifically for this cluster.
axenic_LD.behavioral_description: Genes exhibit 24-h periodic oscillations in axenic L:D cultures but not in coculture or extended darkness conditions.
axenic_LD.confidence_notes: Functional description not specifically discussed for this cluster; behavior inferred from periodicity data.

supporting_quotes.quote: We found that transcripts encoding 69% of all Prochlorococcus proteins exhibited 24-h periodicity in the axenic L:D cultures, while only 6% did so through the first 13 h of extended darkness.

axenic_LD.assessment_notes: Behavioral description based on periodicity data; functional description not detailed.

axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness (mixed, periodicity)
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.confidence_notes: No specific information available for this cluster.
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.assessment_notes: No description or data provided for this cluster.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD (mixed, periodicity)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.functional_description: This large cluster of 902 genes includes many transcripts showing 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultured L:D conditions but not under extended darkness. Includes genes involved in photosynthesis (psbA, psbB, psaA, psaB), Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, and glycogen metabolism.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.behavioral_description: Genes exhibit 24-h periodic oscillations in both axenic and cocultured L:D conditions but lose periodicity under extended darkness.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.confidence_notes: Strong evidence from periodicity and transcript abundance data.

supporting_quotes.quote: The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.
Transcripts associated with a variety of metabolic pathways, including the Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD.assessment_notes: Well supported by transcriptomic periodicity and functional enrichment.

coculture_LD.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster coculture_LD (mixed, periodicity)
coculture_LD.functional_description: This cluster of 328 genes shows 24-h periodicity only in coculture L:D conditions. Not specifically discussed in paper for this cluster.
coculture_LD.behavioral_description: Genes exhibit 24-h periodic oscillations in coculture L:D but not in axenic or extended darkness conditions.
coculture_LD.confidence_notes: Functional description not specifically discussed for this cluster; behavior inferred from periodicity data.

supporting_quotes.quote: More Prochlorococcus transcripts retained their periodicity in cocultures versus axenic cultures, both under extended darkness and even during the normal diel L:D cycle.

coculture_LD.assessment_notes: Behavioral description based on periodicity data; functional description not detailed.
